title: updater-composer plugin configuration
description: Schema v1 for the updater-composer semrel plugin. Configure via SEMREL_* environment variables.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_FILE.description: Path to the composer.json file to update.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_COMPOSER_FILE.description: Alias for SEMREL_PLUGIN_FILE when a Composer-specific override variable is preferred.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_UPDATE_VERSION_FIELD.description: When true, update or add the version field in composer.json.

SEMREL_VERSION.description: Release version for the current semrel execution. semrel core may expose this as SEMREL_VERSION, SEMREL_TAG_NAME, or SEMREL_NEXT_VERSION depending on phase.

SEMREL_NEXT_VERSION.description: Calculated next release version when SEMREL_VERSION is not yet finalized.

SEMREL_DRY_RUN.description: When true, perform validation and logging only without executing side effects.
